title: RBI Governance Amendment Directions on 'Matters to be placed before the Boards of the Banks'
description: <cite index="55-2,55-3">RBI issued Governance Amendment Directions on July 14, 2026, which replace the seven broad themes with a consolidated Board-matters framework for Commercial, Small Finance, Payments and Local Area Banks. The directions introduce principle-based guidance and consolidated Appendix lists specifying what must go to the Board, effective October 1, 2026.</cite>
